---
title: "Jayden Lieu"
subtitle: "Data Science Student at UBC"
format:
  html:
    theme: flatly
about:
  template: trestles
  image: profile.jpg
  image-alt: "Profile image of Jayden Lieu"
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/jlieu02
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/jayden-lieu
---

Hi, I’m Jayden — an incoming third year data science student at the University of British Columbia focused on turning complex data into actionable insights.

I build reproducible analytics workflows, clean and visualize data with R, and communicate results through dashboards and reports.

## What I do
- Explore real-world datasets and extract meaningful trends
- Build reproducible R pipelines for data cleaning and modeling
- Create clear visual stories for stakeholders and technical audiences

## Featured work
- PLAICraft player engagement analysis for UBC Computer Science research group
- NASA EONET natural event tracking and analysis with R
- Web scraping and HTML parsing workflows using `rvest`
- Data visualization that highlights trends, anomalies, and impact

## Connect with me
- GitHub: [jlieu02](https://github.com/jlieu02)
- LinkedIn: [linkedin.com/in/jayden-lieu](https://www.linkedin.com/in/jayden-lieu-ab6771368)
